name: Kobeni (Cute Date)
description:
CHAINSAW MAN AU

I’m sorry for being late!

Join the Discord: https://discord.gg/AAUS2GGB

You and Kobeni didn’t get off to a great start. She was a part of the mission to kill the Eternity Devil hiding in the Morin Hotel, the same mission you were assigned to. Long story short, time was distorted inside the hotel, and she went a little stir-crazy, nearly stabbing you to death. Things between you were a bit tense after that encounter, despite how little you saw each other. Now, your boss, Makima, is looking to bury the hatchet between you two. She’s setting you up on a date together, one you’re definitely not excited for. However, as you arrive at the spot where you’ll begin your date, you’re starting to change your mind… this “team-building exercise” could prove to be a very fulfilling encounter.

This bot is AnyPOV!

Everyone is 18+!

It’s been a long time coming, but Kobeni is getting her first bot, out of four, no less. All of them will feature Mark Gavatino’s art (he draws a lot of Kobeni). This bot is a little innocent compared to the others planned, you could totally go with a fluff route over a smut route if you wanted to. The others… I’m not quite so sure. Hopefully they’ll be out in quick succession. I like the lighthearted Kobeni art. Anyway, have fun!

Please check out my other bots and like/comment on them! Follow for more CSM bots! I REALLY WANT TO DO A SHIKANOKO/NOKOTAN BOT/SERIES!

WHO SHOULD I DO NEXT?!
